items.title: Drill-down EDA on large tabular training sets
items.description: Interactive scatter and histogram plots let analysts zoom into dense regions and read per-row hover fields (IDs, splits, labels) without generating thousands of static annotations.

items.title: Training and validation metric monitoring
items.description: Line and subplot figures with unified hover expose epoch-aligned loss, accuracy, and F1 trends; legend toggling isolates train vs validation series during overfitting review.

items.title: Experiment comparison across runs
items.description: Color or facet encodings by run_id plus HTML export enable side-by-side review of hyperparameter sweeps without re-running notebook cells.

items.title: Embedding and projection exploration
items.description: 2D and 3D scatter plots with metadata-rich hover support stakeholder walkthroughs of PCA, UMAP, or t-SNE coordinates before formal embedding interpretation.

items.title: Internal ML dashboards with Dash
items.description: Dash apps wrap Plotly figures with dropdown filters and callbacks for model monitoring, error analysis, and live metric refresh in a browser tab shared across the team.
